name: well-leveled-grade-7-pass
description: Grade-7-appropriate question requiring fraction multiplication of non-trivial fractions AND scaling — multi-step proportional reasoning. Cognitive demand matches grade 7 (rational-number operations). Must NOT trigger COGNITIVE_DEMAND_MISMATCH.

question.question: Sofia mixes 3/8 cup of strawberries with 2/3 cup of yogurt to make one smoothie. If she scales the recipe to make smoothies for 12 people, how many cups of yogurt does she need in total?
question.explanation: Each smoothie uses 2/3 cup of yogurt. For 12 smoothies, multiply: (2/3) × 12 = 24/3 = 8 cups.
